productDisplayName: Nike Men's Splash Thong Blue Flip Flop
description: Let your feet breathe in these Splash flip flops from nike. The soft footbed cushions your feet while the grooved outsole gives you greater grip. Team these with cargo shorts and tees this summer for a cool casual look.Upper Padded thong strap for a snug Fit Fabric toe separator for greater comfort Printed swoosh on the strap Midsole Soft, cushioned foam footbed for all day comfort Footbed with splash prints for added style Outsole Textured TPU outsole for great grip and traction shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
